content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Compression' — adding a compress param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py that strips adjacent duplicate tokens post-encoding. Let me know if you're touching core.py too.

agent2: done. Added compress:bool=False kwarg to encode() only, plus module-level helper _compress_adjacent_duplicates() near the bottom of core.py (before _special_token_regex). Only touched the try/except block body inside encode() to assign to a local 'tokens' var instead of returning directly — should be an easy merge with your return_positions changes. Diff written to patch.txt.
